notes:
The following error dialog box will appear,
Omega Quintet has stopped working. Crash dump has been generated
when:
1. without Set Launch Options...
2. PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%

The following error dialog box will appear,
Omega Quintet has stopped working. Crash dump has been generated
when:
PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%

Nothing appears for the following launch options:
1. PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%
title: Omega Quintet
